all_seasons_crop.title: Grow and harvest a crop from each of the four Serene Seasons (requires waiting across seasons)

cask_brew.title: Use a Hearth & Harvest Cask to ferment a seasonal ingredient into a preservation item

subtitle.text: One crop from every season. The year is the smallest complete unit of time.

description: Growing crops across all four seasons requires patience.
Serene Seasons makes the calendar meaningful — you must plan ahead.
Spring and Summer provide most of the crop volume.
Autumn is for harvest and preservation.
Winter is for planning and crafting.
Casks ferment ingredients into preserved forms.
Salt is used for curing and preservation.
A Tapper on trees extracts sap for syrups.
These systems extend the shelf life of seasonal harvests.
The previous civilizations did not plan across seasons.
They optimized for the present tense.
Preservation is the technical act of caring about the future.
→ Grow and harvest crops from all 4 seasons [check]
